title: Siphoneranthemum riedelianum
taxonomy: Siphoneranthemum riedelianum is classified within the family Bromeliaceae, which includes a diverse group of tropical plants commonly known as pineapples and air plants. This classification places it in the order Poales, which comprises monocots with parallel-veined leaves. The family Bromeliaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, and Siphoneranthemum riedelianum is a member of the subfamily Tillandsioideae. This subfamily includes species with rosette-shaped leaves and inflorescences that are often highly decorative. The exact classification of Siphoneranthemum riedelianum may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Bromeliaceae family.
